title: What if I have a pre-existing condition?
meta-title: What if I have a pre-existing condition?
meta-description: Even if your income may be too high to get help paying for health coverage, you can still get a good deal on coverage through the Marketplace, and you won’t pay higher costs for pre-existing conditions.
bite: Even if your income may be too high to get help paying for health coverage, you can still get a good deal on coverage through the Marketplace, and you won’t pay higher costs for pre-existing conditions.
page_name: What if I have a pre-existing condition?
page_topic: What if I have a pre-existing condition?
excerpt: Even if your income may be too high to get help paying for health coverage, you can still get a good deal on coverage through the Marketplace, and you won’t pay higher costs for pre-existing conditions. Pre-existing conditions are health problems a person has before the date a new health insurance policy starts. You can’t be charged more because of a pre-existing condition when you get coverage through the Marketplace.
content: Even if your income may be too high to get help paying for health coverage, you can still get a good deal on coverage through the Marketplace, and you won’t pay higher costs for pre-existing conditions. Pre-existing conditions are health problems a person has before the date a new health insurance policy starts. You can’t be charged more because of a pre-existing condition when you get coverage through the Marketplace.
